project_area: Public services (e.g., social services, education, health, recreation, public safety, etc.)
demographic_requirements: Must serve low- and moderate-income individuals, families, the elderly, or people with special needs.
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofit organizations, public agencies, and community-based organizations within the City of Lewiston, Maine. Applicants must demonstrate how their project will benefit low- and moderate-income residents or address community development needs as outlined in the Consolidated Plan.
